caption: In a minimalist white studio, three people stand around small white pedestal tables equipped with microphones. A logo for "mediasite" appears at the top of the scene, and a banner in the background contains the text "PRAKTIJK EN ZORGVRAAG". On the left, a man in a dark navy suit stands by a table, leaning slightly forward. In the center, a woman with short blonde hair wearing a dark blazer and light-colored trousers stands behind a table, initially resting her chin on her hand in a thoughtful pose before shifting to a more upright posture. On the right, a man in a patterned olive-green shirt and dark jeans stands next to a large graphic of two praying hands. As the sequence progresses, the woman moves her hand away from her face and looks toward the other participants, while the men remain relatively stationary in their positions.
